leadText: The Workout Sea (Japanese: ワークアウトの海 Workout Sea) is a part of the Isle of Armor in the Galar region. It connects to the Stepping-Stone Sea to its west, the Fields of Honor to its north, and Brawlers' Cave to its northeast. There is an NPC at the Workout Sea that can make a Galarica Cuff from 8 Galarica Twigs given to her by the player. She is located in the southwest of the Workout Sea, on a large island with stone arches. Another NPC, referred to as Lady Clear, is located on a small island in the eastern half of Workout Sea. She is able to reset all EVs of a single Pokémon, in exchange for 10 Armorite Ores.

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games TR43 ( Overheat ) On the Rotom island, on a cliff Sw Sh Galarica Cuff From a girl on the Rotom island in exchange for eight Galarica Twigs (repeatable) Sw Sh "Poke" Pattern Boatneck Sweater From a girl on the Rotom island for showing her a Galarian Slowpoke Sw Sh "Bro" Pattern Boatneck Sweater From a girl on the Rotom island for showing her a Galarian Slowbro Sw Sh Rare Candy On a small island Sw Sh Calcium On a small island Sw Sh Dubious Disc On a small island; east of the Wailord spawn Sw Sh Destiny Knot On the Ditto island Sw Sh Hidden items [ edit | edit source ] Unless otherwise stated, hidden items in the Isle of Armor regenerate every day. In many of these cases, they can also regenerate as different items. Every item that regenerates every day can also rarely regenerate as a Wishing Piece (at approximately a 1% chance). Item Location Games Pearl On the northern island, next to Lady Clear Sw Sh Repeat Ball On the major island, next to the northern tree Sw Sh Galarica Twig Galarica Twig On the major island, next to the southeastern tree Sw Sh Mago Berry On the major island, between a rock and grass Sw Sh Wiki Berry On the major island, between the center rock and grass Sw Sh Figy Berry On the major island, Next to the eastern rock Sw Sh Galarica Twig On the major island, next to another big tree Sw Sh Revive On the major island, eastern shore Sw Sh Pretty Feather Around the Rotom island, southwest Sw Sh Clever Feather Around the Rotom island, east of the previous item Sw Sh Health Feather Around the Rotom island, south Sw Sh Health Feather Around the Rotom island, southeast Sw Sh Swift Feather Around the Rotom island, northwest Sw Sh Berry tree [ edit | edit source ] Shaking a Berry tree can yield Berries, but a Pokémon may be shaken loose instead and steal some of the Berries after a battle. As with every Berry tree on the Isle of Armor only accessible with the Rotom Bike 's Water Mode, the Berry trees in Workout Sea only give out one of the friendship-raising Berries . On the major island, next to a rock Item Location Games Tamato Berry Falls from the Berry tree Sw Sh On a beach near the Rotom island Item Location Games Kelpsy Berry Falls from the Berry tree Sw Sh

sections.title: Hidden items
sections.text: Hidden items [ edit | edit source ] Unless otherwise stated, hidden items in the Isle of Armor regenerate every day. In many of these cases, they can also regenerate as different items. Every item that regenerates every day can also rarely regenerate as a Wishing Piece (at approximately a 1% chance).
